references.text: Backer, CA. 1951. Myricaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 4: 277-279

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 27 January 2026

species.citation: (Buch.-Ham. ex D.Don) I.M.Turner , Gard. Bull. Singapore 53 (2001) 324; ≡ Myrica esculenta Buch.-Ham. , Prodr. Fl. Nepal. (1825) 56 ; Backer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 4 (1951) 278. = Myrica esculenta var. farquhariana (Wall.) Chev. , Mém. Soc. Natl. Sci. Nat. Cherbourg 32 (1901) 104 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 23; ≡ Myrica farquhariana Wall. , Tent. Fl. Napal. 2 (1826) 60. ≠ Myrica nagi auct. non Thunb. ; Merr., EPFP 2 (1923) 23.
species.distribution: Borneo, Java, Java Sea, Lesser Sunda Isls, Malay Peninsula, Philippines, Sumatra. LUZON: Albay, Bataan, Zambales (photos).

species.citation: (Blume) I.M.Turner , Gard. Bull. Singapore 53 (2001) 324; ≡ Myrica javanica Blume , Bijdr. fl. Ned. Ind. (1826) 517 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 23; Backer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 4 (1951) 277.
species.distribution: Borneo, Java, Lesser Sunda Isls, New Guinea, Philippines, Sulawesi, Sumatra. CAMIGUIN, LUZON: Albay, Apayao (photos), Laguna, Nueva Ecija, Quezon, MINDANAO: Bukidnon (photos), Cotabato, Davao, Davao del Sur, Misamis Occidental, Misamis Oriental (photos), South Cotabato, MINDORO, NEGROS.
